newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The record Q2 FY26 results (revenue $297M, orders +97% to $490M, backlog $1.8B +33%) and the $400M+ behind-the-meter data-center mega order (largest in company history, flowing through FY2028) were reported in early May and were already in the prior case.

verdicts.rankRationale: On this crowding-sensitive list, record backlog and the $400M+ data-center order are already known and the +157% YTD rerating has consumed most residual alpha (crowded/rerated bucket). No new catalyst since June 9; prior small nudge up stands. Hold at 47.
verdicts.bull: Record $1.8B backlog, $400M+ data-center mega order through FY28; switchgear bottleneck for AI power buildouts.
verdicts.neutral: Strategically central but already richly rerated (+157% YTD); fresh alpha limited on a passives-residual screen.
verdicts.bear: Crowded, fully-priced; order timing/capacity-expansion execution and project lumpiness.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Data-center electrical-room backlog conversion and capacity expansion.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation/crowding and project execution after large rerating.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent under-covered AI supply-chain lens, switchgear is a genuine data-center power bottleneck and Powell's exposure is direct, but the large run makes it less hidden. No new evidence since June 9; thesis unchanged. Hold at 51.
verdicts.bull: Direct switchgear bottleneck in data-center power delivery; record orders/backlog and capacity-add optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Real exposure but increasingly well-covered; latent-alpha edge eroding as story becomes consensus.
verdicts.bear: +157% YTD lowers fresh alpha; cyclical end-markets and lumpy mega-order timing.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Behind-the-meter on-site generation/electrical-room orders for AI sites.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Reduced under-coverage; valuation and order cadence.
